## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/verify.sh` passes locally
- [ ] One issue per branch; this PR addresses only the linked issue
- [ ] Any shell execution goes through the safety layer (no direct `Process.Start` in tools)
- [ ] Tests don't assume a desktop session (no session bus / display required)
- [ ] Docs and ADRs updated if a decision or contract changed
- [ ] Privacy impact considered (new context sources gated, cloud usage visible, audit log covered)
